textPlain: Hard Disk Drives (HDD’s) are one of the most impressive and important electromechanical devices ever created. The mechanics of HDD vibration is an obscure subject, and as a result, there is an aura of mystery surrounding vibration ...
I recall a video of a guy temporarily reducing hard drive performance by shouting at itedit: here it is! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tDacjrSCeq4
next try shouting at a wafer stepper
